name: meshy_remesh
description: Remesh a 3D model using Meshy.ai to optimize topology and polygon count. Accepts either a Meshy task ID from a previous generation or a public URL to a 3D model file (.glb, .gltf, .obj, .fbx, .stl). After calling, poll with meshy_check_task using source='remesh' until complete, then download with meshy_download_model. Costs 5 Meshy.ai credits. Use this to clean up mesh topology or reduce polycount of generated models.

input_task_id.description: ID of a completed Meshy text-to-3D or image-to-3D task to remesh. Provide this OR model_url, not both.

model_url.description: Public URL to a 3D model file to remesh. Provide this OR input_task_id, not both.

topology.description: Target mesh topology. 'triangle' for decimated mesh, 'quad' for quad-dominant mesh (better for deformation/animation). Default: 'triangle'.

target_polycount.description: Target polygon count (100-300000). Default: 30000. Use the same budget rules as meshy_generate_model: hero assets up to 100000, environment up to 10000, props up to 3000.
